title: adenostemma erectum
intro: Adenostemma erectum, also known as the 'false dragonhead', is a plant species native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands, characterized by its tall, erect stems and small, white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Adenostemma erectum include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and supporting digestive health. Adenostemma erectum is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies, such as cough syrups and expectorants.
